content: {"cards": [{"name": "Vigilant Recruit", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Human Soldier", "oracle_text": "", "flavor_text": "\"Every village needs those willing to stand watch while others sleep.\"", "power": "2", "toughness": "1", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A vanilla white creature at common. 2/1 for 2 mana is slightly below the power curve, showing restraint. White's creatures are often smaller but numerous, fitting its color identity. The Human Soldier typing reinforces white's organized military themes."}, {"name": "Steadfast Guardian", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Human Knight", "oracle_text": "Vigilance", "flavor_text": "\"I do not rest until the last citizen is safe.\"", "power": "2", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A single-keyword creature showcasing vigilance, one of white's signature abilities. 2/3 vigilance for 3 mana is fair common power level. Vigilance fits white's defensive nature - able to attack while still protecting. Knight typing reinforces white's organized military structure."}, {"name": "Divine Verdict", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Exile target attacking creature.", "flavor_text": "\"Justice knows no hesitation.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "White's signature exile-based removal at uncommon. Conditional on the creature attacking, which fits white's defensive philosophy - it punishes aggression rather than preemptively destroying threats. Exile over destroy shows white's clean, permanent solutions. Double white in cost shows color commitment."}, {"name": "Scholarly Insight", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Draw a card, then scry 1.", "flavor_text": "\"Knowledge reveals the path; wisdom chooses which way to walk.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A blue cantrip with a minor effect. Draw a card replaces itself, while scry 1 provides card selection - both core blue abilities. 2 mana is the standard cost for draw + small effect at common. The sequencing (draw then scry) lets you see the new card before deciding what to scry away."}, {"name": "Arcane Disruption", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}.", "flavor_text": "\"Magic demands precision. Doubt invites failure.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "A soft counterspell that gives the opponent a choice - pay 3 or lose the spell. This creates interesting decisions and doesn't feel as oppressive as hard counters. 2 mana with a {3} tax is fair power level for uncommon. Tests proper counterspell templating with 'unless its controller pays' clause."}]}
